Reviewing its highly sci-fi business license: it does not produce ordinary consumer electronics but points directly to the most upstream sectors of the industry—'R&D and assembly of microwave equipment, radar supporting equipment, RF components, and integrated circuits'—and cross-disciplinarily deeply cultivates the R&D of 'ceramic composite materials, metamaterials, functional glass, and novel optical materials.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is absolutely not an ordinary electronic device assembly plant or trading shell, but an 'Advanced RF & Metamaterials R&D Firm' (a cutting-edge military/communications R&D enterprise deeply cultivating the fields of microwave RF, radar components, and metamaterials).
